case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. NILS GRIFFINC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED JUL-24-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, NILS INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PACIFIC RIM DETECTIVE AGENCY
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, NILS INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PACIFIC RIM DETECTIVE AGENCY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $11,589.70 DAMAGES, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $393.78 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,483.48, *COST INCLUDES INTEREST OF $225.78 AND COST OF $168.00; FAIR MARKET VALUE OF EQUIPMENT IS $750.00; PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESION. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, NILS INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PACIFIC RIM DETECTIVE AGENCY DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2003
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE RE: EVID CODE 1521,1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $168.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, NILS INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PACIFIC RIM DETECTIVE AGENCY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
